title: Minimal Module
description: A small module that shows the expected structure for community modules: manifest, mount, i18n, settings, MVVM and scoped UI.

quickStart.title: How to use this example
quickStart.step2: Refresh the FFTA Modules page; PHP autodiscovery finds the manifest automatically.
quickStart.step3: Open the module from the internal navigation.
quickStart.step4: Use this structure as a starting point for your own module.

files.title: Expected files
files.manifest: declares the module identity, capabilities, styles and settings.
files.mount: registers routes, menu entries, i18n and services.
files.application: contains the store and ViewModel orchestration.
files.ui: renders state and emits user actions only.
files.i18n: keeps user-facing labels out of the code.
